post.summary: Get all class versions by class code .
Get multiple classes by class code and version.
Get a specific class by class code and version.
Creates a new ETIM class RFC (for new class or existing class modification)
post.description:
Requires Idempotency-Key header (UUID) to prevent duplicate RFC creation on retry.

Error Handling (per RFC 9110):
- 400 BadRequest: Malformed request (missing required fields, invalid format) → Returns ValidationProblemDetails
- 422 UnprocessableEntity: Valid format but business rules violated (invalid codes, data integrity issues) → Returns ProblemDetails
- 500 Internal Server Error: Unexpected server errors (database timeout, system failures) → Returns ProblemDetails

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Idempotency key to prevent duplicate RFC creation on retry. Must be a unique UUID for each distinct request.

requestBody.description: The RFC request (use ExistingClassId for modifying existing class, or ClassName for new class)

pageSize.description:
Effective page size used for this query. May be lower than the requested Size
when heavy nested fields (e.g. Features) are included.
Clients should use this value (not the requested Size) to calculate the next From offset.

classes.description: List of classes matching the input filters

from.description:
Startposition for paging.
From must be less than or equal to 29000. From + size must be less than or equal to 30000

size.description:
Total records per page
Size must be less than or equal to 1000. From + size must be less than or equal to 30000

languagecode.description:
Language of the output description fields. 
Language of the input SearchString if used

searchString.description: Search with a specific text in description or synonym

deprecated.description:
Some entities (features, values and units) can be deprecated. This means they may not be used anymore in future.
If not set, return both deprecated and not deprecated entities
If Deprecated = true, return only deprecated entities
If Deprecated = false, return only entities that are not deprecated
Only applicable for features, values and units

modelling.description:
Deprecated!! For modelling classes, use the ModellingClass service
The class service only returns product classes

filters.description: Use filters to filter the results

status.description:
Class status
2 - Under construction
3 - Ready for publication
5 - Published
9 - Deleted

modelling.description: Indicates if this is a modelling class

dimensionalDrawingSvgUrl.description: Dimensional Drawing Svg for modelling classes

description.description: Class description in the requested language

synonyms.description: Class synonyms in the requested language

description.description: Feature description in the requested language

translations.description: Feature translations for all entitled languages

orderNumber.description: Feature order number within this class, eg: 2

featureGroupCode.description:
To prevent to much redundancy, for a feature within the class, the FeatureGroupCode is provided, instead of the complete featuregroup.
For descriptions and translations of the featuregroup, use the FeatureGroup service.

translations.description: Value translations for all entitled languages

orderNumber.description: Value order number within the class feature, eg: 2

description.description: Feature Group description for the requested language

translations.description: Feature Group translations for all languages the client is entitled to.

description.description: Group description for the requested language

translations.description: Group translations for all languages the client is entitled to.

hasImage.description: This reference product has image available

id.description: Id can be used to retrieve Image if HasImage is true.

description.description: Unit description in the requested language

abbreviation.description: Unit abbreviation in the requested language

translations.description: Unit translations for all languages the client is entitled to.

Startposition for paging.
From must be less than or equal to 29000. From + size must be less than or equal to 30000

size.description:
Total records per page
Size must be less than or equal to 1000. From + size must be less than or equal to 30000

languagecode.description:
Language of the output description fields. 
Language of the input SearchString if used

searchString.description: Search with a specific text in description or synonym

deprecated.description:
Some entities (features, values and units) can be deprecated. This means they may not be used anymore in future.
If not set, return both deprecated and not deprecated entities
If Deprecated = true, return only deprecated entities

modelling.description:
Deprecated!! For modelling classes, use the ModellingClass service
The class service only returns product classes

filters.description: Use filters to filter the results

local.description:
Local standard feature.
If not set, return both local standard and non local standard features
If Local = true, return only local standard features
If Local = false, return only non local standard features
Only applicable for features

localStandardCountry.description:
Local standard feature for Country.
Only applicable when Local = true

values.description:
List of filter values for the specified filter code, eg:

Release values: "DYNAMIC", ..., "ETIM-4.0" --> Only applicable to classes and groups

Group values: "EG000001", "EG000002" etc. --> Only applicable to classes and groups

Class values: "EC000001", "EC000003" etc. --> Only applicable to classes

Feature values: "EF000001", "EF000003" etc. --> Only applicable to classes and features

Value values: "EV000001", "EV000003" etc. --> Only applicable to classes and values

descriptions.description:
Set to true to include these fields for the specified languagecode:

- description field (Class, Group, Feature, Value, Unit)

- synonyms field (Class)

- abbreviation field (Unit)

translations.description:
Set to true to include the translations field for all languages the client is entitled to

You can find the translations field in Class, Group, Feature, Value and Unit

fields.description:
Specify which fields should be included in the result. Possible values:

- Group (within Class)

- Features (within Class)

- Releases (within Class)

- FeatureGroup (within Feature)

status.description:
Class status
2 - Under construction
3 - Ready for publication
5 - Published
9 - Deleted

modelling.description: Indicates if this is a modelling class

dimensionalDrawingSvgUrl.description: Dimensional Drawing Svg for modelling classes

translations.description: Value translations for all entitled languages

classes.description: List of classes matching the input filters

values.description:
List of filter values for the specified filter code, eg:
	/// 
Group values: "MG000001", "MG000002" etc. --> Only applicable to classes and groups

Class values: "MC000001", "CT000003" etc. --> Only applicable to classes

ProductClass values: "EC003024", "EC011392" etc. --> Only applicable to classes
            
Feature values: "EF000001", "EF000003" etc. --> Only applicable to classes and features

Value values: "EV000001", "EV000003" etc. --> Only applicable to classes and values

translations.description: Group translations for all languages the client is entitled to.

fields.description:
Specify which Class fields should be included in the result. Possible values:

- Group
- Features
- Ports
- Ports.Features
- ConnectionTypes
- ProductClasses

from.description:
Startposition for paging.
From must be less than or equal to 29000. From + size must be less than or equal to 30000

size.description:

deprecated.description:
Some entities (features, values and units) can be deprecated. This means they may not be used anymore in future.
If not set, return both deprecated and not deprecated entities
If Deprecated = true, return only deprecated entities
If Deprecated = false, return only entities that are not deprecated

isLatestReleased.description:
If not set, return all versions for a class
If IsLatestReleased = true, return only latest released version for a class
If IsLatestReleased = false, return only all but latest released classes
Only applicable for classes

isLatest.description:
If not set, return all versions for a class
If IsLatest = true, return only latest version for a class
If IsLatest = false, return only all but latest version classes
Only applicable for classes
